title: patis coreana
intro: Patis coreana, commonly known as Korean angelica, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and improving digestion. The health benefits of Patis coreana are attributed to its therapeutic actions, such as anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-oxidant properties, which are thought to be mediated by its bioactive constituents, including ferulic acid, ligustilide, and butylphthalide. These constituents have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-cancer properties, making Patis coreana a valuable herb in traditional medicine.
intro_study: According to "Zhong yao cai = Zhongyaocai = Journal of Chinese medicinal materials", Patis Coreana (also known as Patrinia scabra) may have erythrocyte immunoregulation effects, including prolonging life expectancy and improving erythrocyte immunologic function in mice with transplanted tumors.
